message:
fix(clippy): resolve 105 clippy -D warnings across frankenterm-core (ft-jqvg5)

Fix all clippy warnings for `cargo clippy -D warnings` with
distributed,asupersync-runtime,web features across 44 files:

- 45x suboptimal_flops: `a += b * c` → `a = b.mul_add(c, a)`
- 18x collapsible_match: collapse inner `if` into match guards
- 15x unnecessary_trailing_comma in format!() macros
- 7x Duration readability: `from_millis(1000)` → `from_secs(1)`
- 7x missing semicolons on closure last statements
- 6x doc_lazy_continuation: indent list continuations
- 3x explicit_counter_loop: use enumerate/zip patterns
- 2x let_unit_value / ignored_unit_patterns
- 1x iter_kv_map: `.into_iter()` → `.into_keys()`
- 1x redundant closure: inline function reference

Verified: 0 clippy warnings remaining (only pre-existing compilation
errors in tcp_tls_labruntime.rs from other agents' incomplete work).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
